title: adicea pavonii
intro:
Adicea pavonii, also known as the Velvet-fronted Manakin, is not a plant, it's actually a species of bird native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. However, I found that there is a plant called Pavonia, which is a type of hibiscus. Since I couldn't find information on "Adicea pavonii" as a plant, I will provide information on Pavonia. 

Pavonia, also known as Rose Mallow or Pavonia, is a plant known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pavonia include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and acting as a natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Pavonia include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to address various health issues.
